About.title: About Samutprakan Esport
About.description: We are dedicated to building a professional ecosystem for competitive gaming in Samutprakan. Our platform empowers organizers to host world-class tournaments and players to discover their potential.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: We provide the tools for competitive integrity and fair play.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Bringing together gamers from all across the province.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.desc: Standardizing tournament management for official organizations.

passion.title: Passion
passion.desc: Built by gamers, for gamers, with the spirit of the game.

partner.title: Interested in partnering?
partner.description: If you are an organization or sponsor looking to support the Samutprakan Esports Association, we would love to hear from you.

Tournament.no_participants_yet: No competitors have entered the arena yet.

Tournament.arena_empty_desc: Start managing matches in this tournament
Tournament.arena_preparing: The arena is currently being prepared.
Tournament.setup_required: You need to configure the tournament format and stages before you can generate the bracket.

Tournament.rules_agreement: By joining, you agree to the Samutprakan Esport Association official tournament rules.

Setup.title: Tournament Setup
Setup.stage_desc: Define how matches are played in this stage.
Setup.access_desc: Control how competitors join your arena.
Setup.open_reg_desc: Allow players to find and join publicly.
Setup.auto_desc: Instant join. Players enter the arena immediately upon registration.
Setup.manual_desc: Curated arena. You review and approve each entry before they are confirmed.
Setup.deadline_hint: Players won't be able to join after this time. Leave empty for no deadline.
Setup.ready_live: Ready to take your tournament live?
Setup.double_check: Double check all settings before publishing. Once registrations start, changing the tournament format might affect active brackets.
Setup.reg_full_desc: All slots are filled. You can skip these settings and proceed to finalize the tournament.

Admin.platforms_subtitle: Define the hardware ecosystems where matches take place.
